headline: PGIM Announces Net Asset Value Restatement for Three Exchange-Traded Funds (PAB, PSDM, PTRB)
summary: NEWARK, N.J., June 03, 2026--This restatement is the result of an accounting error in calculating each exchange-traded fund’s NAV by a third-party administrator.
